meaning: 富山[日本本州岛中北岸港市]
examples: A volcanic beach off Toyama Bay glows electric blue.
Toyama prefecture is rich in hot spring resources, and is also known for hot spring bath.
Kentaro Toyama - Kentaro Toyama is a visiting scholar at the School of Information, University of California, Berkeley.
Toyama Bay is the third biggest bay in Japan and home to one of the largest seafood distribution centres in the nation, rivalling Tokyo and Osaka.
In 1999, I went to Toyama, Japan, to briefly train with my uncle Yasushi Naoe, who was a kaiseki chef for over 50 years.
